Dh.
Here Jupiter exalted, indicator of
Moon
life force, is conjunct Saturn, Venus
and Ketu•in Cancer, a watery sign.
The native will be responsible for maintaining institutions for the
feedings of the poor and wandering Sadhus. He will also maintain religious
and educational institutions.
Saturn and Ketu indicate darkness and shade. The Moon is placed in
Libra (sign of Venus). This indicates pure light.
